modules.name: Core API
modules.description: Main Stellarium scripting API - core.* functions including time, date, location, movement, object selection, and multimedia

modules.name: Sky Culture Manager
modules.description: Sky culture management - change and query cultural astronomy systems (constellation names, star names, zodiac systems, lunar mansions) from different world cultures

modules.name: Asterism Manager
modules.description: Asterism (star pattern) management functions for informal star patterns like Summer Triangle, Big Dipper

modules.name: Constellation Manager
modules.description: Constellation lines, boundaries, artwork, and cultural astronomy systems including zodiac and lunar mansions

modules.name: Custom Object Manager
modules.description: Custom objects and markers management - add, remove, and customize markers on the celestial sphere

modules.name: Highlight Manager
modules.description: Highlight markers management - add, remove, and customize visual markers on the celestial sphere

modules.name: Grid Lines Manager
modules.description: Manages all celestial coordinate grids, great circles, and reference points

modules.name: Label Manager
modules.description: Custom label management - create text labels attached to celestial objects, fixed coordinates (horizon/equatorial), or screen positions with customizable colors, fonts, and auto-delete options

modules.name: Marker Manager
modules.description: Custom marker management - create visual markers attached to celestial objects, fixed equatorial coordinates, or horizon positions with customizable shapes, colors, sizes, and auto-delete options

modules.name: Landscape Manager
modules.description: Core landscape management functions, Atmosphere model and rendering controls, Cardinal and ordinal compass point displays, Landscape display options (fog, illumination, labels, transparency), Landscape installation, removal, and management

modules.name: Sporadic Meteor Manager
modules.description: Background sporadic meteor simulation with random radiants and colors

modules.name: Nebula Manager
modules.description: Core deep-sky object display controls, Marker colors for all types of deep-sky objects, Catalog and type filtering for deep-sky objects, Search functions for deep-sky objects by catalog number, Advanced settings for deep-sky object display, Utility functions for deep-sky objects

modules.name: Screen Image Manager
modules.description: Screen image management - create, move, scale, fade, and delete overlay images on the screen for presentations and scripts

modules.name: Solar System
modules.description: Core solar system display controls, Orbit and label colors for solar system bodies, Size scaling for planets, Moon, Sun, and minor bodies, Ephemeris marker and path visualization, Search and information functions for solar system bodies, Advanced solar system settings (threads, magnitudes, orbits), Utility functions for solar system management

modules.name: Stars Manager
modules.description: Core star display controls and settings, Star names (common, cultural, scientific) and designations, double star, and binary orbit data, Search functions for stars by catalog number, Lists of Hipparcos stars (double, variable, carbon, etc.)

modules.name: Actions Manager
modules.description: Keyboard shortcuts and actions management - create, find, and trigger actions, manage shortcuts

modules.name: Audio Manager
modules.description: Audio playback management - load, play, pause, stop, and unload sound files (MP3, WAV, OGG, FLAC) with position and duration queries

modules.name: Video Manager
modules.description: Video playback management - load, play, pause, stop, seek, resize, and control video files with support for popout effects and audio control

modules.name: Movement Manager
modules.description: Camera and view movement management - pan, zoom, tracking, mount modes, and viewport control

modules.name: Sky Drawer
modules.description: Sky rendering control - star appearance, twinkling, light pollution, magnitude limits, eye adaptation, atmospheric refraction and extinction

modules.name: Sky Layer Manager
modules.description: Sky background image management - load, display, and control deep-sky object textures, DSS images, and custom sky overlays

modules.name: Special Markers Manager
modules.description: Special markers management - FOV center crosshair, circular FOV marker, rectangular FOV marker (for camera framing), and compass marks around the horizon

modules.name: Milky Way
modules.description: Milky Way galaxy rendering - control visibility, intensity, saturation, and color tint of our galaxy's appearance across the night sky

modules.name: Zodiacal Light
modules.description: Zodiacal Light rendering - control visibility, intensity, and color of the faint diffuse glow caused by sunlight scattering off interplanetary dust along the ecliptic plane

modules.name: HiPS Manager
modules.description: Hierarchical Progressive Surveys (HiPS) management - load and display all-sky survey images from professional observatories (DSS, SDSS, GALEX, etc.)

modules.name: Nomenclature Manager
modules.description: Planetary surface nomenclature management - display names of craters, mountains, valleys, and other geological features on planets and moons

modules.name: Satellites Plugin
modules.description: Artificial satellites tracking - display positions of Earth-orbiting satellites based on NORAD TLE data with automatic updates, orbit lines, and customizable markers

modules.name: Quasars Plugin
modules.description: Quasars visualization - plot positions of quasars brighter than magnitude 18, with distribution mode and customizable marker colors

modules.name: Pulsars Plugin
modules.description: Pulsars visualization - plot positions of pulsars from the ATNF catalog, with DM filtering, glitch indicators, and customizable colors

modules.name: Exoplanets Plugin
modules.description: Exoplanets visualization - plot stars with known exoplanets, habitable zone filtering, timeline mode, and customizable colors

modules.name: Observability Plugin
modules.description: Observability analysis - displays rise/set/transit times, opposition dates, and observability periods for celestial objects

modules.name: Oculars Plugin
modules.description: Oculars plugin - simulate view through telescope eyepieces, CCD sensor framing, Telrad finder, and astrophotography planning

modules.name: Equation of Time Plugin
modules.description: Equation of Time display - shows the difference between apparent solar time (sundial) and mean solar time (clock) in minutes

modules.name: Navigational Stars Plugin
modules.description: Navigational stars marking - displays markers and navigational data (SHA, GHA, altitude, azimuth) for celestial navigation stars from various catalogs (Nautical Almanac, Apollo, Meade, etc.)

modules.name: Meteor Showers Plugin
modules.description: Meteor showers simulation - displays radiants, ZHR values, and simulated meteors for active showers based on IMO and IAU data

modules.name: ArchaeoLines Plugin
modules.description: Archaeoastronomy tool - displays declination circles, solstice/equinox lines, lunar standstill lines, and custom azimuth/altitude lines for cultural astronomy studies

modules.name: Telescope Control Plugin
modules.description: Control GoTo telescopes via TCP/IP (Stellarium protocol), serial connection (LX200, NexStar), INDI, ASCOM (Windows), or RTS2. Shows telescope positions with reticles, labels, and FOV circles

modules.name: Calendars Plugin
modules.description: World calendars display and scripting - Gregorian, Julian, Islamic, Hebrew, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Vietnamese, Maya (Long Count, Haab, Tzolkin), Hindu (Solar/Lunar), Tibetan, Aztec, Persian, Baháʼí, French Revolutionary, and many more with astronomical calculations (sunrise, sunset, moon phases, etc.)

modules.name: Object Manager
modules.description: Object selection and extra information management - control selection pointer visibility, add custom text to information panel for debugging and script output (Script and DebugAid flags)
